- If there were no high‑urgency triggered incidents: Post "All clear." to the "incidents" Slack channel.
- If there are high‑urgency triggered incidents: Send ONE email to oncall@acme.io with the subject "Triage" whose body lists each incident's id.
- Always report how many such incidents exist.
